en: Yes. No, no, no.
There is no problem.
We're coming out right now.
Well, that was good. That was good.
What did you... you pay some hotel desk clerk to make that call for you?
ko: 당신이... 호텔 프론트 직원에게 전화를 걸게 해달라고 돈을 줬나요?

en: Is that what you did?
Yes, Captain Luke. I've got one minute to bring you out.
ko: 네, 루크 대장. 당신을 데려올 시간이 1분 남았어요.

en: Captain Luke! Captain Luke! Ooh, Captain Luke.
ko: 루크 대장! 루크 대장! 오, 루크 대장.

en: Well, Carl, I gotta say, that... that sounds
ko: 음, 칼, 내가 말해야겠어요, 그... 그건 꽤 공식적으로 들리네요.

en: pretty official to me, but, like I said, I...
I think it's just me and you here. It's me
and you, so you're gonna have to catch me.
ko: 나와 당신이니까, 나를 잡아야 해요. 프랭크!

en: Frank! Frank! You have to trust me on this.
These people have been embarrassed, Frank.
ko: 이 사람들은 창피를 당했어요, 프랭크. 그들은 화가 나 있어요.

en: They're angry. You robbed their banks, you
steal their money, you live in their country.
ko: 그들의 돈을 훔쳤고, 그들의 나라에 살고 있어요.

en: I told you this was what was going to happen.
ko: 내가 이 일이 일어날 거라고 말했잖아요.

en: But there was no other way for it to end.
Don't make a mistake.
That's good. That's good, Carl.
You know, keep pushing that lie.
Keep pushing it. Keep
pushing until you make it true.
ko: 진짜로 만들어낼 때까지 밀어붙여. 그들이 널 죽일 거야!

en: They're gonna kill you!
ko: 그 문을 나가면, 널 죽일 거야.

en: You walk out that door, they're gonna kill you.
